properties.description: Locks the Fabricator, when set to 1. Unlocks it when set to 0.
Writing on this Parameter will reset the ExportCount and ImportCount values to zero. Will set itself back to 0 when actioned.
Activates the Fabricator, when set to 1. Deactivates it, when set to 0.
Opens the Fabricator, when set to 1. Closes it, when set to 0.
Turns the Fabricator on, when set to 1. Turns it off, when set to 0.
How many items imported since last ClearMemory.
How many items exported since last ClearMemory.
Returns whether the Fabricator is flashing an error. (0 for no, 1 for yes)
The amount of power, currently needed by the Fabricator, in Watts.
Current hash of the recipe the device is set to produce.
Returns the amount of reagent contents in the Fabricator in grams.
Returns whether the Fabricator is turned on and receives power. (0 for no, 1 for yes)
